episodes.title: 'Survivors carry the burden,' families of Epstein victims demand accountability | AFP
episodes.description:
Victims of the late disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein and House Democrats hold a press conference ahead of US President Donald Trump’s State of the Union address. "Virginia’s story is the story so many survivors know too well," says Sky Roberts, brother of the late Virginia Giuffre, an Epstein victim. "It’s a system that too often makes the survivor carry the burden instead of the perpetrator." SOUNDBITE

episodes.title: Images of Andrew's residence in Sandringham as former prince released by police | AFP
episodes.description:
Images outside Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's residence in Sandringham, as the former prince in "released under investigation" having been arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office for his links to late US sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Images of ex-prince Andrew's residence on Sandringham Estate and local police stations | AFP
episodes.description:
Images of Wood Farm on the Sandringham Estate and nearby police stations, after Britain's former prince Andrew was arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office for his links to late US sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Norfolk police have said they are aiding Thames Valley Police in the investigation. It is not known where the former prince is being held.
